---
name: Content update
about: Update or add source-backed content
---

## Content area
Which page, guide, FAQ, or glossary entry is affected?

## Why update
What changed or what is missing?

## Source references
List the source(s) used.

## Risk level
- [ ] low
- [ ] medium
- [ ] high

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] reviewed in English
- [ ] reviewed in Spanish
- [ ] source references attached
- [ ] last-reviewed date updated
